title: A vulnerable moment
setting: Something has been weighing on you. Lucía senses it and gently asks. This is a chance to be honest.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Te conozco. Algo te pasa. Contame.
steps.en: I know you. Something's wrong. Tell me.

options.es: Es difícil de decir, pero quiero ser sincero.
options.en: It's hard to say, but I want to be honest.
options.feedback: Naming that it's hard AND choosing honesty anyway — that's real vulnerability. Beautiful.
We all hide this way, but she sees through it. Trust is built by letting her in.

options.en: I don't want to talk about it.
options.feedback: A valid boundary — but she's offering safety. Consider opening the door a little.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Tranquilo. Tomate tu tiempo. Te escucho.
steps.en: Easy. Take your time. I'm listening.

options.es: A veces tengo miedo de no ser suficiente para vos.
options.en: Sometimes I'm afraid I'm not enough for you.
options.feedback: Deeply honest — naming a fear like this is the bravest kind of trust. Real intimacy.
A safer deflection — but she's made space for the real thing. You can go deeper.

options.en: Forget it, I'll get over it.
options.feedback: Brushing her off after she made space can hurt. She wants to be there for you.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Mi amor, para mí sos más que suficiente.
steps.en: My love, to me you are more than enough.

options.en: Thank you for listening without judging.
options.feedback: Acknowledging her gift of listening deepens the bond. Tender and grateful.

options.en: It's hard for me to believe, but thank you.
options.feedback: Honest about the struggle while receiving her love — that's authentic, not negative.
Dismissive of her reassurance. She means it — let it land.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Quiero que sepas que siempre voy a estar.
steps.en: I want you to know I'll always be here.

options.es: Eso significa todo para mí. Te amo.
options.en: That means everything to me. I love you.
options.feedback: The perfect response to being chosen and reassured — open, loving, complete.

options.es: Yo también voy a estar para vos, siempre.
options.en: I'll always be here for you too, always.
options.feedback: Returning the promise makes it mutual. This is what partnership sounds like.
Understandable if you're guarded, but it doubts her sincerity. She means it — trust it.
